project.name: Demo Calendar Mobile
project.summary: Expo React Native calendar demo that reads, creates, and deletes events through the Demo Taskboard event API.
goals: Provide the Expo mobile calendar demo for iOS, Android, and web development targets.
Own the React Native calendar screen, event cards, create-event sheet, mobile API client, and React Query hooks.
Keep the mobile event model compatible with the documented Demo Taskboard /api/events surface.
nonGoals: Own the Demo Taskboard web/API service, database schema, enterprise doctrine, or shared scheduling platform semantics.
Own customer-specific mobile workflows outside this demo.
Own reusable scheduling contracts until they are promoted into a dedicated shared package or service.

owns.name: demo-calendar-mobile-client
owns.description: The Expo React Native app manifest, entrypoint, calendar screen, components, mobile styling, and app-level React Query wiring.

owns.name: demo-calendar-mobile-api-client
owns.description: The mobile API client, event types, and React Query hooks that consume the deployed Demo Taskboard event API.

doesNotOwn: The Demo Taskboard web/API service, database schema, migrations, deployment, or server-side event semantics.
Enterprise engineering doctrine and manifest schema owned by SylphxAI/doctrine.
Reusable scheduling platform semantics or customer-specific mobile workflows outside this demo.

allowedDependencies.surface: project manifest schema and engineering doctrine

forbiddenCouplings: Do not reach into Demo Taskboard source internals, database tables, migrations, or deployment state from the mobile client.
Do not put shared scheduling platform semantics or customer-specific workflow policy into this demo mobile app.
Do not fork doctrine standards into this repository.

delivery.deployPath: No repo-local GitHub CI or deployment workflow is present. The Expo app currently runs through local Expo scripts for start, android, ios, and web targets.
delivery.productionProof: TypeScript/Expo validation, platform launch smoke for the changed target, and event API compatibility readback against the configured demo endpoint.

gaps.description: The repository has Expo run scripts but no GitHub PR or merge_group CI workflow recorded at this baseline.
The mobile client hardcodes the deployed Demo Taskboard API base URL; add documented environment/configuration and compatibility smoke guidance before production lifecycle promotion.
